headline: UBS Maintains Buy on MSCI, Raises Price Target to $720
summary: UBS  analyst Alex Kramm   maintains MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $710 to $720.

headline: MSCI (MSCI) Is Up 9.5% After Strong Q1 2026 Results And Capital Returns - What's Changed
summary: MSCI Inc. has reported past first-quarter 2026 results with revenue of US$850.8 million and net income of US$406 million, alongside a quarterly dividend of US$2.05 per share and completion of a share repurchase program totaling 2,414,482 shares for US$1.35 billions. The combination of strong earnings growth, higher earnings per share, and continued capital returns through buybacks and dividends underscores how MSCI is pairing operational performance with shareholder-focused capital...

The combination of strong earnings growth, higher earnings per share, and continued capital returns through buybacks and dividends underscores how MSCI is pairing operational performance with shareholder-focused capital...

headline: MSCI Q1 Deep Dive: AI-Driven Product Acceleration and Market Diversification Bolster Growth
summary: Investment analytics provider MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 14.1% year on year to $850.8 million. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.55 per share was 2.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
